overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character with a decorated shield ascending a snowy mountain path at dusk. The character travels from a narrow cliffside trail through a mountain pass onto an open snow-covered slope under a dramatic red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain trail along cliff face with mixed terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow mountain trail with a large cliff wall on the left side

entered.detail: tall gray rock cliff face running parallel to the path
distant snow-capped peaks visible against the red sky
narrow winding path with patches of grass and exposed rock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a tall cliff wall on the left. The path is surrounded by sparse vegetation with distant snow-covered mountains visible ahead against the dark red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-filled mountain pass between rock walls

events.description: character turns right at the trail junction entering the snow-covered mountain pass
ground surface transitions completely from dirt to deep snow

agents.ego_description: turning right at the trail junction and beginning to ascend through the snowy mountain pass

entered.detail: steep rock formation rising on the right side of the path
thick snow covering the mountain path with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a snow-filled mountain pass with rock walls on both sides. The ground becomes completely covered in snow as the character ascends through the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain slope with distant peaks

events.description: exiting the narrow mountain pass into open snow-covered terrain

agents.ego_description: steadily climbing the open snow-covered slope toward the distant mountain peaks

entered.detail: wide open snow-covered slope extending toward the horizon
jagged mountain peaks silhouetted against the red sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow pass, the character ascends an expansive open snow field. The terrain opens up to reveal distant mountain peaks under the dramatic red dusk sky, with the character continuing the steady climb upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a narrow cliffside trail into a vast, snow-covered mountain expanse under a dramatic red sky. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path hugging a tall cliff wall, surrounded by sparse vegetation with distant peaks visible ahead. As the character turns right, the terrain shifts into a narrow mountain pass where the ground becomes completely blanketed in snow between towering rock walls. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the passage, transitioning from the confined corridor onto an expansive open snow field. Finally, the camera follows the steady climb upward across the white slope, revealing a wide vista of distant mountain peaks beneath the deep red glow of dusk.
